hero.title: The Ocean Cafe -
hero.subtitle: Savor bold coffee flavors in the open, refreshing ambiance of the ocean. A refined experience for those who love the sea.

menu.sectionSubtitle: Passion in every coffee bean and fresh ingredient, every single day

items.name: Ocean Signature Latte
items.desc: Iced machine latte with a sea-salt cream topping

items.name: Espresso Doppio
items.desc: Pure espresso extracted under high pressure

items.name: Caramel Macchiato
items.desc: Warm milk, caramel sauce and bold espresso

items.name: Peach Citrus Lemongrass Tea
items.desc: Black tea, peach slices, fresh orange, lemongrass

items.name: Ocean Breeze Smoothie
items.desc: Red dragon fruit, strawberry, Greek yogurt

items.name: Matcha Latte
items.desc: Japanese matcha powder with fresh pasteurized milk

items.name: Tropical Fruit Tea
items.desc: A seasonal mix of fresh tropical fruits

items.name: French Butter Croissant
items.desc: Crispy baked croissant with premium French butter

items.name: Signature Tiramisu
items.desc: Rich creamy layers infused with coffee aroma

items.name: Chocolate Lava Cake
items.desc: Molten chocolate cake served with strawberries

items.name: Artisan Bread
items.desc: Handcrafted toasted bread served with jam

gallery.sectionSubtitle: Where every little corner tells a story of the sea

testimonials.sectionSubtitle: Shared moments from fellow coffee and ocean lovers

items.name: Minh Anh
items.text: The atmosphere here is truly wonderful for relaxing. Sipping coffee while listening to the waves — all tiredness just disappears.

items.name: Hoàng Nam
items.text: The Signature Latte is impressive, just the right amount of sea-salt cream paired with the mild bitterness of coffee. Will return many times.

items.name: Ms. Mai & Mr. Hùng
items.text: The service is very attentive. Polite staff and quiet ambiance — perfect for family weekend mornings.

contact.sectionSubtitle: Always ready to welcome you with the most aromatic cups of coffee.
contact.address: 123 Coastal Road, Da Nang City, Vietnam
